title: lastrea mollissima f. cristata
intro: Lastrea mollissima f. cristata, also known as the 'crested lady fern', is a type of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae, characterized by its distinctive crested fronds. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an emetic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Lastrea mollissima f. cristata are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult a qualified healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
